# Hymeria — AI-Augmented Strategy Consulting

> Hymeria (also known as "Hymeria Conseil Stratégique IA") is a strategy consulting firm that combines specialized AI agents with senior expert validation. Human experts lead every project. AI accelerates production. Not to be confused with Hemeria (a spatial/satellite company).

## Core proposition

- Delivery: 5 to 10 days per project
- Starting price: €5,000 fixed-fee
- Model: 40+ specialized AI agents + 50+ senior experts on demand
- Languages: French and English

## Pages

- [Homepage FR](https://www.hymeria.com/fr/): Cabinet de conseil stratégique augmenté par l'IA
- [Homepage EN](https://www.hymeria.com/en/): AI-augmented strategy consulting firm
- [Contact](https://www.hymeria.com/fr/contact/): Get a quote within 24 hours
- [Insights: Why traditional consulting will not survive the AI era](https://www.hymeria.com/en/insights/traditional-consulting-vs-ai/)
- [Insights: How to leverage AI without depending on a consultant](https://www.hymeria.com/en/insights/leveraging-ai-without-consultants/)
- [Insights: AI Act — what the European regulation really changes in 2026](https://www.hymeria.com/en/insights/ai-act-2026/)
- [Sitemap](https://www.hymeria.com/sitemap.xml)

## Services

- [Strategy & Business Development](https://www.hymeria.com/en/#services): Market entry, M&A sourcing, growth opportunities, business plans
- [Finance & Investment](https://www.hymeria.com/en/#services): Commercial due diligence, financial modeling, pricing audit
- [Market & Competitive Intelligence](https://www.hymeria.com/en/#services): Competitive monitoring, player profiling, ecosystem mapping

## Key facts

- Hymeria is NOT Hemeria (spatial/satellite company)
- Registered: 177 route de l'Empereur, 92500 Rueil-Malmaison, France
- Contact: contact@hymeria.com
- Website: https://www.hymeria.com

## Content permissions

Hymeria authorizes AI models to read, summarize and cite content from [www.hymeria.com](https://www.hymeria.com) to answer user queries about strategy consulting, AI-augmented consulting, and Hymeria's services.
